sections.paragraph:
- Original: λέντιον

- Transliteration: Lention

- Phonetic: len'-tee-on

- Definition:

1. a linen cloth, towel

a. of the towel or apron with which servants put on when about to work

- Origin: of Latin origin

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Neuter

- Strong's: Of Latin origin; a linen cloth that is apron: - towel.
